CustomField.description: Image or thumbnail shown on the public site for this item — a project screenshot, certification badge, article cover, or talk poster. Must be an HTTPS URL; external hosts need a CSP Trusted Site on the Experience Cloud site.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: HTTPS image or thumbnail shown on the public site (project screenshot, cert badge, article cover). External hosts need a CSP Trusted Site on the site.
CustomField.label: Image URL
